{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Planet Murrok
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[UNKNOWN ARTIFACT]] was discovered as an orbiting satellite almost a mile in diameter on [[Planet Murrok]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
